title: ficus pedunculosa var. mearnsii
intro: Ficus pedunculosa var. mearnsii, also known as Mearns' fig or Ficus mearnsii, is a species of fig tree native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus pedunculosa var. mearnsii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
